fields.metaDescription: Define the outcome first (leads, sales assist, support deflection), assign attribution rules you can defend, and separate leading indicators from lagging revenu
faqs: Is ROI possible for brand awareness?
fields.imageAltText: How to Measure Social Media ROI — InstantViral Learn featured image
fields.newsletterCopy: Define the outcome first (leads, sales assist, support deflection), assign attribution rules you can defend, and separate leading indicators from lagging revenue. Avoid invented ROI percentages.
